docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAIN, TAMARA AS TO DEFENDANT MIMVI, INC A NEVADA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
